name: Mansion #15
description: Al-Ghafr, 'The Covering,' ruled by Saturn, is associated with hidden things and extracting value from concealed sources. While it creates obstacles for travel, it is excellent for finding treasure and recovering lost things. The covering stars of Libra, with Zubenelgenubi marking the southern scale, hold the secrets of hidden treasures. The artwork renders these stars in Saturn's deep indigo-black palette with veiled geometric layers revealing treasures within.

attributes.value: Finding lost objects, extracting treasures, uncovering secrets
